title: Broken Mobs
description: Re-models a bunch of Minecraft Mobs to look entirely broken and cursed
body:
# Broken Mobs - Resource Pack
### **Created by Knarfy for a video on his channel!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/p9PAgv25IZ4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Literally all it does is ruin a ton of entity models! If you want your game to look absolutely chaotic, this is the resource pack for you!

Requires a Custom Model Features Mod to load correctly!\
Optifine or CEM will work!

**Recommended Mods:**
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

**Here's a few examples:**

![Breeze and Blaze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TxWL11MZ/images/98f3b4581964f8cfb8f3a040ef4b0ca87bbf38d3.png)
![Angy boi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TxWL11MZ/images/599537a74237e3493558771d3b36156f58de7ee5.png)
![creepy boi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TxWL11MZ/images/319f96b0842bbe29ce610b326afd097098189d15.png)
